articles.title: Lakers 3 Headed Monster - Updated
articles.original_title: Lakers 3 Headed Monster - Updated
articles.summary: Lakers 3 man group has almost played as many minutes post all-star break as in the 54 games prior. The data was really skewed by Lebron and Reeves injuries but was taken as gospel for weeks. They now officially have a positive +/- for the first time all season, showing that they weren't even that far negative if it could be fixed this quickly.  Can we stop showing the line-up data and just see what they can do?     submitted by    /u/Dry_Writer_5803   [link]   [comments]

articles.title: Aston Martin's car risks giving drivers 'nerve damage' and is unlikely to finish F1 season-opener
articles.original_title: Aston Martin's car risks giving drivers 'nerve damage' and is unlikely to finish F1 season-opener
articles.summary: Aston Martin has predicted it is unlikely to finish Formula 1's season-opening Australian Grand Prix on Sunday without its drivers risking permanent nerve damage.  Adrian Newey, the F1 car design great who’s heading into his first race as Aston Martin’s team principal, said Thursday the team's Honda power unit causes vibrations which could damage the hands of drivers Fernando Alonso and Lance Stroll.  Neither will likely be able to tolerate even half of the 58-lap race distance and the car's rac

articles.title: Leonard scores 29 as the Clippers beat the Pacers 130-107 for a third straight win
articles.original_title: Leonard scores 29 as the Clippers beat the Pacers 130-107 for a third straight win
articles.summary: Kawhi Leonard scored 29 points, Bennedict Mathurin scored 23 on 8-for-11-shooting, and the Los Angeles Clippers won their third in a row, 130-107 over the Indiana Pacers on Wednesday night.  Brook Lopez had 17 points for the Clippers while Darius Garland had 12 in his first home game since being acquired in a trade from the Cleveland Cavaliers last month.  Pascal Siakam had 29 points in his return after sitting out three games with a left wrist sprain to lead Indiana, but the Pacers lost their s

articles.title: Nikolaj Ehlers' hat trick leads Hurricanes past Canucks 6-4
articles.original_title: Nikolaj Ehlers' hat trick leads Hurricanes past Canucks 6-4
articles.summary: Nikolaj Ehlers sealed his seventh career hat trick with an empty-net goal and the Carolina Hurricanes held off the Vancouver Canucks for a 6-4 victory on Wednesday night.  Sean Walker, Andrei Svechnikov and Sebastian Aho each added a goal and an assist for the Hurricanes.  Seth Jarvis had two assists and Brandon Bussi stopped 18 shots.

articles.title: Blues beat Kraken 3-2 to halt Seattle's 5-game home winning streak
articles.original_title: Blues beat Kraken 3-2 to halt Seattle's 5-game home winning streak
articles.summary: Dylan Holloway scored the go-ahead goal in the second period, Brayden Schenn had three assists and the St. Louis Blues beat the Seattle Kraken 3-2 on Wednesday night.  Robert Thomas added a goal and an assist, and defenseman Logan Mailloux also scored as the last-place Blues improved to 9-17-3 on the road with their second consecutive victory away from home against a playoff contender.  Joel Hofer made 34 saves for St. Louis, which won 3-1 on Sunday at Minnesota after going 2-8-1 in its previous

articles.title: Diallo and Steinbach each have career highs to lead Washington over USC 91-72
articles.original_title: Diallo and Steinbach each have career highs to lead Washington over USC 91-72
articles.summary: SEATTLE (AP) — Zoom Diallo scored a career-high 26 points, Hannes Steinbach added 22 with a career-best 24 rebounds, and Washington rolled past Southern California 91-72 on Wednesday night. Washington took the lead for good with 12:31 remaining. A 13-0 run that started with 4:33 to play pushed the Huskies' lead to 85-65 with about two minutes left.
